title: Senior Plant Manager at Reckitt India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Reckitt India
jsonLd.description:
Reckitt India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Reckitt India:
Reckitt India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reckitt India!
